title: Short title
doc_html:
PART III.  HEALTH INSURANCE ISSUER EXTERNAL REVIEW ACT

§2431.  Short title

This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Health Insurance Issuer External Review Act".

Acts 2013, No. 326, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
doc_text:
PART III.  HEALTH INSURANCE ISSUER EXTERNAL REVIEW ACT
§2431.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "Health Insurance Issuer External Review Act".
Acts 2013, No. 326, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
